text: <par>The glosses are a little obscure. This source is best utilized in conjunction with Clark 1911 to figure out the actual meanings of each word.</par>
Note: Source id's not prefixed by 'p.' correspond to the Appendices. With respect to transcription, 'c' = /tʃ/ (with allophones [tʃ] and [ts]). Macrons (e.g. ā) mark mid tone.
